description_long: This is a vintage, wall-mounted lantern constructed primarily from dark, weathered metal. The lantern features a cylindrical body with a rounded, ribbed base and a matching upper chamber, both connected by a central band. A prominent, circular mounting plate is attached to one side, designed for affixing the lantern to a vertical surface. The top of the lantern has a hinged lid with a small handle, and a curved carrying or hanging handle is attached to the side. The overall design suggests it is an oil lamp, with a spout and knob visible for adjusting the wick or flame, and no visible glass enclosure.
description: A vintage, wall-mounted metal lantern with a cylindrical body, hinged lid, and curved handle, designed for oil-based illumination.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cylindrical body, hinged lid, curved handle, and large circular mounting plate.
description_view_1: Bottom view highlighting the base and the underside of the mounting plate, with spout and knob visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mounting plate, cylindrical body, and the top lid with handle.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the mounting plate, curved handle, and the top lid from behind.
